info.description: Promotions offered by an affiliate; applied to referred users at sign-up or during bookings

name.description: Admin-facing label, e.g. 'Free Float Top-Up' or 'Ride Discount 30%'

action.description: What the promotion does. float-topup/wallet-credit are applied once at sign-up. *-discount are applied per booking.

amount.description: Flat credit amount for float-topup / wallet-credit actions

percentageAmount.description: Percentage off fare for ride-discount / delivery-discount actions

usageLimit.description: Max times a single referred user can benefit from this promotion

isDefault.description: If true, auto-created for every new user's affiliate profile

expiresAt.description: Optional hard expiry. After this date the promotion is never applied.

affiliateOwner.description: The affiliate user who owns / offers this promotion
